title: Embeddings go through the gateway with the SpiderGate PAT — no raw OPENAI_API_KEY
summary: Agents reach for a raw OPENAI_API_KEY to call text-embedding-3-*; with SpiderGate they don't. POST /api/gate/v1/embeddings is OpenAI-compatible: point the openai SDK at base_url=https://spideriq.ai/api/gate/v1, use the per-brand SpiderGate PAT (cli_…:sk_…:secret_…) as api_key, and send agent/embed-small (→text-embedding-3-small/1536), agent/embed-large (→3072), or agent/embed (→small). The underlying OpenAI key lives in the brand vault and an admin owns it. Unlike images/TTS/STT (raw model names only), embeddings carry SpiderGate aliases. input is a single string or a batch; dimensions overrides the alias default. Spend is metered automatically (gate_request_logs request_kind='embedding', spiderGateLlm meter) and per-key-capped like chat. There is NO fallback chain — if the brand has no embeddings-capable key (vault supports_embeddings flag), the call returns 503 no_embeddings_key (fail-loud). HTTP-only today: no gate_embed MCP/CLI tool yet (gap 4).
references: EMB.1 (#1803) deployed master 539e6372; board 424629e2 Wave E
